front.title: A Policy-Driven Implicit TLS Transport Profile for PCEP

abstract.t:
RFC 8253 specifies the use of Transport Layer Security (TLS) for the Path Computation Element Communication Protocol (PCEP) by negotiating TLS using the PCEP StartTLS message exchange. This document specifies a deployment profile for PCEP in which TLS is initiated immediately following TCP connection establishment based on local policy.
This document is intended to simplify deployments where secure transport is mandatory.
